name: Stable Cell Line Generation (Antibiotic Selection + Single Clone Isolation)
nameCn: 稳定细胞系建立（抗生素筛选 + 单克隆分离）

components.name: 1. Establish kill curve for parental cells (before transfection/transduction)

note.en: Seed 2×10⁵ cells/well in 6-well plate. Next day, add antibiotic at 0, 0.5, 1, 2, 4, 8 µg/mL (Puro) or 0, 100, 200, 400, 800 µg/mL (G418). Check daily × 7 days. Optimal = lowest dose achieving 100% kill by day 3–5 (Puro) or day 7–10 (G418).
note.zh: 6 孔板每孔接种 2×10⁵ 细胞。次日加抗生素梯度：Puromycin 0, 0.5, 1, 2, 4, 8 µg/mL 或 G418 0, 100, 200, 400, 800 µg/mL。每日观察 × 7 天。最佳浓度 = 第 3–5 天（Puro）或第 7–10 天（G418）实现 100% 杀灭的最低浓度。

components.name: 2. Transfect or transduce cells with expression construct

note.en: Plasmid: cell_transfection (Lipofectamine/PEI). Lentivirus: lentivirus_production (MOI 0.3–1 for single integration). Wait 48 h before adding selection.
note.zh: 质粒：cell_transfection（Lipofectamine/PEI）。慢病毒：lentivirus_production（MOI 0.3–1 确保单拷贝整合）。48 h 后开始加筛选药物。

components.name: 3. Begin selection: add antibiotic at kill-curve concentration; change medium every 2–3 days

note.en: Puromycin: typical 1–2 µg/mL; kills in 24–48 h (fast-acting). G418 (Geneticin): typical 200–800 µg/mL; kills in 5–7 days. Hygromycin: 100–400 µg/mL; 3–5 days. Blasticidin: 2–10 µg/mL; 3–5 days. Remove dead cells by medium change.
note.zh: Puromycin：通常 1–2 µg/mL；24–48 h 杀灭（快速）。G418：200–800 µg/mL；5–7 天杀灭。Hygromycin：100–400 µg/mL；3–5 天。Blasticidin：2–10 µg/mL；3–5 天。换液去除死细胞。

components.name: 4. Maintain selection 7–14 days until resistant colonies appear

note.en: Colonies visible by eye at ~100+ cells. Avoid disturbing plates. If too many colonies → high starting MOI; if none → kill curve, DNA quality, or transfection efficiency.
note.zh: 菌落生长至 ~100+ 细胞时肉眼可见。避免移动培养皿。过多 → 初始 MOI 过高；无菌落 → 检查杀灭曲线、DNA 质量、转染效率。

components.name: 5. Pick single clones (Method A: cloning ring)

note.en: Wash plate with PBS. Place autoclaved glass cloning ring (8 mm dia.) over isolated colony; seal with sterile silicone grease. Add 50 µL trypsin inside ring, 3–5 min 37°C. Transfer dissociated cells to 24-well plate well (500 µL complete medium).
note.zh: PBS 洗板。灭菌玻璃克隆环（8 mm）对准单个克隆放置，无菌硅脂密封。环内加 50 µL 胰酶，37°C 3–5 min。转移解离细胞到 24 孔板（500 µL 完全培养基）。

note.en: Trypsinize mixed population, count, dilute to 0.5 cells/well in 96-well plate (200 µL/well). Seed multiple plates (200+ wells needed for ~50 clones). Mark wells with single cell by microscopy next day. Expand single-cell wells over 2–3 weeks.
note.zh: 胰酶消化混合细胞，计数，稀释至 0.5 个细胞/孔接种 96 孔板（200 µL/孔）。铺多板（200+ 孔获得 ~50 个克隆）。次日显微镜标记单细胞孔。2–3 周扩增。

note.en: Sort single cells directly into 96-well plate (complete medium + 20% FBS conditioned medium). GFP+ gating if reporter available. Pre-coat wells with poly-D-lysine for poorly adherent cells. ~30–50% survival for most cell lines.
note.zh: 流式分选单细胞直接入 96 孔板（完全培养基 + 20% FBS 条件培养基）。有 GFP 报告基因可门控。弱贴壁细胞预包被多聚赖氨酸。大多数细胞系存活率约 30–50%。

components.name: 8. Expand clones: 96-well → 24-well → 6-well → T25; maintain selection throughout

note.en: Passage when 80–90% confluent. Each expansion takes 3–7 days. Keep selection antibiotic at maintenance dose (half kill dose). Freeze early passage aliquots.
note.zh: 80–90% 汇合时传代。每次扩增 3–7 天。维持剂量（杀灭浓度的一半）持续加药。早期传代冻存分装。

components.name: 9. Validate clones: WB, qPCR, genomic PCR, functional assay

note.en: WB: target protein expression (wb_protocol). qPCR: mRNA level (qpcr_protocol). Genomic PCR: integration site/copy number. Functional: phenotypic assay. Screen ≥10 clones; select 2–3 best.
note.zh: WB：目标蛋白表达（wb_protocol）。qPCR：mRNA 水平（qpcr_protocol）。基因组 PCR：整合位点/拷贝数。功能验证：表型分析。筛 ≥10 个克隆，选最优 2–3 个。

detailedSteps.en: Seed parental cells (not transfected) at 2×10⁵ cells/well in a 6-well plate (2 mL/well complete medium). Incubate overnight at 37°C.
detailedSteps.zh: 亲本细胞（未转染）按 2×10⁵/孔接种 6 孔板（2 mL/孔完全培养基）。37°C 过夜孵育。

detailedSteps.en: Next day, add antibiotics at serial dilutions: for Puromycin: 0, 0.5, 1, 2, 4, 8 µg/mL; for G418: 0, 100, 200, 400, 800 µg/mL. Return to incubator.
detailedSteps.zh: 次日加梯度抗生素：Puromycin：0, 0.5, 1, 2, 4, 8 µg/mL；G418：0, 100, 200, 400, 800 µg/mL。放回培养箱。

detailedSteps.en: Check cells daily for 7 days. Record % cell death at each concentration. The optimal antibiotic concentration = lowest dose that kills 100% of cells by day 3–5 (Puromycin) or day 7–10 (G418).
detailedSteps.zh: 每日检查 7 天。记录每个浓度下的细胞死亡百分比。最佳抗生素浓度 = 第 3–5 天（Puro）或第 7–10 天（G418）100% 杀灭的最低浓度。

detailedSteps.en: Transfect cells with plasmid DNA (cell_transfection protocol) or transduce with lentivirus (lentivirus_production) at MOI 0.3–1 for single integration. Return to incubator.
detailedSteps.zh: 质粒 DNA 转染（cell_transfection 方案）或慢病毒转导（lentivirus_production），MOI 0.3–1 以确保单拷贝整合。放回培养箱。

detailedSteps.en: Wait 48 h after transfection/transduction for expression before starting antibiotic selection.
detailedSteps.zh: 转染/转导后等待 48 h 表达，再开始抗生素筛选。

detailedSteps.en: Add antibiotic at the kill-curve concentration to the culture. Change medium + antibiotic every 2–3 days. Dead cells will round up and detach.
detailedSteps.zh: 按杀灭曲线浓度向培养物加抗生素。每 2–3 天换液加药。死细胞变圆脱落。

detailedSteps.en: Continue selection for 7–14 days until resistant colonies appear (~100+ cells, visible by eye). Do not disturb plates during this period.
detailedSteps.zh: 持续筛选 7–14 天直到抗性菌落出现（约 100+ 细胞，肉眼可见）。此期间勿移动培养皿。

detailedSteps.en: Method A (Cloning ring): Wash plate with PBS. Place autoclaved glass cloning ring (8 mm) over an isolated colony. Seal with sterile silicone grease. Add 50 µL trypsin inside ring, 3–5 min at 37°C. Transfer dissociated cells to one well of a 24-well plate with 500 µL complete medium + antibiotic.
detailedSteps.zh: 方法 A（克隆环）：PBS 洗板。灭菌玻璃克隆环（8 mm）对准单个克隆放置。无菌硅脂密封。环内加 50 µL 胰酶，37°C 3–5 min。转移解离细胞到 24 孔板（500 µL 完全培养基 + 抗生素）。

detailedSteps.en: Method B (Limiting dilution): Trypsinize entire population, count cells. Dilute to 0.5 cells/200 µL/well in 96-well plate. Seed multiple plates (200+ wells needed to obtain ~50 clones). Check next day under microscope; mark wells with exactly one cell. Expand over 2–3 weeks.
detailedSteps.zh: 方法 B（有限稀释）：胰酶消化全部细胞，计数。稀释至 0.5 个细胞/200 µL/孔，接种 96 孔板。铺多板（200+ 孔以获得约 50 个克隆）。次日显微镜检查；标记仅有一个细胞的孔。2–3 周扩增。

detailedSteps.en: Method C (FACS sorting): Trypsinize, resuspend in complete medium + 20% FBS conditioned medium. Sort single cells directly into 96-well plates using FACS. Pre-coat plates with poly-D-lysine for poorly adherent cells. Return to incubator.
detailedSteps.zh: 方法 C（FACS 分选）：胰酶消化，完全培养基 + 20% FBS 条件培养基重悬。流式细胞仪分选单细胞入 96 孔板。弱贴壁细胞预先包被多聚赖氨酸。放回培养箱。

detailedSteps.en: Expand clones stepwise: 24-well → 12-well → 6-well → T25 flask. Passage when 80–90% confluent. Maintain antibiotic selection at maintenance dose (½ kill-curve concentration) throughout expansion.
detailedSteps.zh: 逐步扩增克隆：24 孔 → 12 孔 → 6 孔 → T25 瓶。80–90% 汇合时传代。全程维持抗生素（杀灭浓度的 ½）筛选。

detailedSteps.en: Freeze early-passage clones (P2–P3): trypsinize, count, resuspend at 1–5×10⁶ cells/mL in 90% FBS + 10% DMSO. Slow-freeze at −80°C in Mr. Frosty, transfer to LN₂.
detailedSteps.zh: 早期传代克隆（P2–P3）冻存：胰酶消化，计数，90% FBS + 10% DMSO 重悬至 1–5×10⁶/mL。Mr. Frosty −80°C 慢速降温，转液氮。

detailedSteps.en: Validate by WB: check target protein expression (wb_protocol). By qPCR: check mRNA level (qpcr_protocol). Genomic PCR: confirm integration. Functional assay: verify phenotype. Screen ≥10 clones; select 2–3 best for further use.
detailedSteps.zh: WB 验证：检查目标蛋白表达（wb_protocol）。qPCR：检查 mRNA 水平（qpcr_protocol）。基因组 PCR：确认整合。功能验证：表型分析。筛选 ≥10 个克隆；选最优 2–3 个进一步使用。

briefSteps.en: Kill curve (1 week) → Transfect/transduce cells → 48 h expression → Add antibiotic, select 7–14 d → Pick single clones (ring/limiting dilution/FACS) → Expand 96→24→6-well → Maintain selection → Freeze P2–P3 → Validate by WB/qPCR/functional assay
briefSteps.zh: 杀灭曲线（1 周）→ 转染/转导细胞 → 48 h 表达 → 加抗生素筛选 7–14 天 → 挑单克隆（环/有限稀释/FACS）→ 扩增 96→24→6 孔 → 维持筛选 → P2–P3 冻存 → WB/qPCR/功能验证

note.en: Cells can be maintained under antibiotic selection at 37°C for 1–3 weeks — change medium every 2–3 days
note.zh: 细胞可在 37°C 抗生素筛选下维持 1–3 周——每 2–3 天换液

note.en: Validated clones frozen at P2–P3 in LN₂ can be stored indefinitely
note.zh: P2–P3 验证克隆冻存于液氮中可无限期保存

note.en: Expanded clones at any passage can be frozen as backup stocks
note.zh: 任何传代的扩增克隆都可冻存作为备份

notes.en: Timeline: transfection → selection (2 weeks) → clone picking (1 day) → expansion (3–4 weeks) → validation (1 week) = ~6–8 weeks total. Always freeze early-passage validated clones at P2–P3. Compare ≥2 independent clones to rule out clonal variation. For CRISPR knockouts: validate by WB + Sanger sequencing of target region.
notes.zh: 时间线：转染→筛选（2 周）→挑克隆（1 天）→扩增（3–4 周）→验证（1 周）= 共 ~6–8 周。验证后在 P2–P3 冻存。至少比较 ≥2 个独立克隆排除克隆变异。CRISPR 基因敲除：WB + 靶区域 Sanger 测序双重验证。

ref: Freshney (2016) Culture of Animal Cells, 7th ed., Ch. 13; Mao et al. (2018) STAR Protoc Preview; Kim & Bhatt (2020) Nat Protoc 15:3199–3230

usage.en: Generate stable cell lines by antibiotic selection after transfection or transduction.
usage.zh: 转染或转导后通过抗生素筛选建立稳定细胞系。
